name: For Thickener
servings: prep. time 5 min. | chilling time 4 hours | cooking time 10-15 min. | serves 6
method: In a bowl, mix the ingredients for the thickener together, and set aside.
Combine the rice and water in a saucepan over high heat and bring it to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low, and let it simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
Continue simmering until the water has been absorbed and the rice is soft (about 20 minutes).
Add the milk and sugar and adjust heat to high to bring it to a boil.
Give the thickener mixture a quick swirl and stir it into the rice.
Add vanilla and mix well. Remove the pot from the heat.
Spoon the pudding mixture into individual bowls. Sprinkle with cinnamon and cool to room temperature.
